ourStory.mainTextPart1: Since 2017, ON DM has been a trusted digital solutions agency serving Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE.
ourStory.mainTextPart2: We use the latest strategies and data-driven insights to help businesses build a strong online presence, create impactful content, and run marketing campaigns that deliver real results.
ourStory.mainTextPart3: Whether your goal is to grow your brand, boost sales, or improve customer experience, our expert team turns your dream into success.
ourStory.tagline: ON DM more than digital solutions agency

meta.title: ON-DM LMS Platform
meta.description: NELC-ready, bilingual LMS for Saudi training providers — courses, payments, certificates, and operations in one white-label platform.

hero.title: A learning platform built for Saudi training operations
hero.subtitle: Built for Saudi training providers who are done patching tools together. NELC-ready, bilingual, and wired for real operations

featureLead.leadTitle: Lead with NELC integration — not just another LMS.
featureLead.leadPoint1: Certificate issuance, completion records, and audit trails designed around regulated training workflows.
featureLead.leadPoint2: Connect learner progress to eligibility and reporting expectations without duct-taping spreadsheets.
featureLead.leadPoint3: One platform for bilingual delivery, payments, and owner-level visibility.
featureLead.pillar1Desc: Reduce friction from signup to first lesson with guided paths and clear access control.
featureLead.pillar2Desc: Coordinate cohorts, content updates, and support without losing context across teams.
featureLead.pillar3Desc: Controlled issuance and history learners and regulators can trust.
featureLead.pillar4Desc: Built for steady traffic, live sessions, and peak enrollment windows.

capabilities.title: Not a course player — a commercial training platform
capabilities.subtitle: Everything your training business needs to sell, deliver, and operate in one place.

multiFormat.title: Multi-format courses
multiFormat.body: Sell single courses, diploma tracks, and bundled learning paths with professional product pages and smart conversion flows.

saudiPayment.title: Saudi payment stack
saudiPayment.body: Accept Mada, local card schemes, Apple Pay, STC Pay, and bank transfers with SAR pricing, VAT-aware receipts, and reconciliation workflows built for Saudi training businesses.

nelc.title: NELC & xAPI compliance
nelc.body: Issue certificates through a controlled pipeline, persist completion records, and connect learner data to NELC/FutureX eligibility flows.

cohort.title: Live & cohort delivery
cohort.body: Run scheduled cohorts, live sessions, and self-paced tracks — all in one white-label platform your team controls.

arabicFirst.title: Arabic-first experience
arabicFirst.body: Full RTL UI, Arabic + English bilingual delivery, and nationality-aware onboarding logic built in from day one.

analytics.title: Reporting & dashboards
analytics.body: Track enrollments, payments, completion rates, course performance, and learner activity from one operational dashboard.

personas.title: Built for operations, not just demos
personas.subtitle: Give each team a clear view of what matters day to day.
personas.operationsIntro: Monitor enrollments, sessions, and learner issues from one control surface.
personas.operationsItem1: Queue and resolve access, payment, and progress exceptions with full history.
personas.operationsItem2: Coordinate cohort schedules, instructors, and content releases without email chains.
personas.operationsItem3: Standard operating procedures baked into roles, permissions, and audit trails.
personas.operationsItem4: Support bilingual learners with consistent messaging and RTL-ready UI.
personas.revenueIntro: See revenue, fulfillment, and funnel performance without exporting to BI tools.
personas.revenueItem1: Track catalog performance, bundles, and promotions with clear attribution.
personas.revenueItem2: Reconcile bank transfers and gateway payments against orders automatically.
personas.revenueItem3: Forecast cohort fill rates and capacity with operational dashboards.
personas.revenueItem4: Report to owners with trustworthy numbers — not spreadsheet snapshots.

metrics.title: Why teams consolidate on one platform
metrics.subtitle: Qualitative outcomes teams target when they stop stitching tools together.
metrics.disclaimer: Illustrative emphasis — not a statistical survey of all customers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers before you request a demo.
faq.supportBody: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out — we'll connect you with the LMS team.
faq.q1: Is the platform suitable for training centers in Saudi Arabia?
faq.a1: Yes. It is built for training centers that need course management, enrollment, payments, certificates, and reporting in one experience suited to the Saudi market.
faq.q2: Does the platform align with National eLearning Center (eLC / formerly NELC) expectations?
faq.a2: The platform includes proven technical readiness around organizing course data, learner records, completions, certificates, and reporting aligned with Saudi e-learning operating expectations. It does not constitute formal legal accreditation unless issued by the competent authority.
faq.q3: Can we run the platform with our center's branding?
faq.a3: Yes. You can tailor the platform with your identity, colors, pages, and UX that matches your brand.
faq.q4: Does the platform support Arabic and English?
faq.a4: Yes. It supports Arabic and English experiences, including proper RTL UI for Arabic-speaking learners in Saudi Arabia.
faq.q5: Can we manage payments inside the platform?
faq.a5: Yes. You can connect payments and organize orders and receipts to fit how your center operates.

finalCta.title: Ready to run a Saudi-ready LMS — not another generic stack?
finalCta.body: Start with NELC readiness, add Saudi payment flows, and give your learners a bilingual platform they'll actually complete. Launch in days, not months.
finalCta.contactHint: Prefer email? Reach us through the contact page — we’ll route you to the LMS team.

saudiSection.title: A platform tuned for how Saudi training centers operate
saudiSection.subtitle: From enrollment and payments to certificates and reporting, ON-DM is designed to reduce manual work and unify operations in one professional experience.
saudiSection.point1Body: A platform under your name and colors that gives learners a professional experience from the first visit.
saudiSection.point2Body: Manage courses, trainers, learners, sessions, and payments from one dashboard.
saudiSection.point3Body: A structure that helps you organize records and data in line with e-learning expectations in Saudi Arabia.
